script:
set +e

echo "== Migrate gabriel (lu: gabriel) =="
if ! id "gabriel" >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash "gabriel" && echo created; fi
sudo usermod -a -G azureuser "gabriel"
sudo -u "gabriel" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude "/home/gabriel/.claude" 2>/dev/null
sudo -u "gabriel" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json "/home/gabriel/.claude.json" 2>/dev/null
sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure "/home/gabriel/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo chown -R "gabriel:gabriel" "/home/gabriel/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl stop "gabriel-bot.service" "gabriel-responder.service" 2>/dev/null
PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' "/etc/systemd/system/gabriel-bot.service" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
echo "  PORT=$PORT"
for f in "gabriel-bot.py" "gabriel-responder.py" "gabriel-graph-token.sh" "gabriel-send-to.sh" "gabriel-remember.sh" "gabriel-install-chat-app.sh" "gabriel-pinned.sh" "gabriel-download.sh"; do
  [ -f "/home/azureuser/$f" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/$f" "/home/gabriel/"
done
[ -d "/home/azureuser/.gabriel-bot" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/.gabriel-bot" "/home/gabriel/"
[ -d "/home/azureuser/gabriel-teams-app" ] && sudo cp -r "/home/azureuser/gabriel-teams-app" "/home/gabriel/"
for f in "/home/gabriel/gabriel-bot.py" "/home/gabriel/gabriel-responder.py" /home/gabriel/gabriel-*.sh; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.gabriel-bot|/home/gabriel/.gabriel-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/gabriel-|/home/gabriel/gabriel-|g" "$f"
done
sudo chown -R "gabriel:gabriel" "/home/gabriel/gabriel-bot.py" "/home/gabriel/gabriel-responder.py" /home/gabriel/gabriel-*.sh "/home/gabriel/.gabriel-bot" "/home/gabriel/gabriel-teams-app" 2>/dev/null
sudo chmod 600 "/home/gabriel/.gabriel-bot/creds.json" 2>/dev/null
for unit in "gabriel-bot" "gabriel-responder"; do
  UF="/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service"
  sudo tee "$UF" > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: gabriel)
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "gabriel-responder" ]; then echo "gabriel-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=gabriel
WorkingDirectory=/home/gabriel
Environment=HOME=/home/gabriel
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "gabriel-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=$PORT"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/gabriel/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
done
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl start "gabriel-bot.service" "gabriel-responder.service"
sleep 3
echo "  bot=$(systemctl is-active gabriel-bot.service) resp=$(systemctl is-active gabriel-responder.service)"

echo "== Migrate jesus-reyes (lu: jesusr) =="
if ! id "jesusr" >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash "jesusr" && echo created; fi
sudo usermod -a -G azureuser "jesusr"
sudo -u "jesusr" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude "/home/jesusr/.claude" 2>/dev/null
sudo -u "jesusr" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json "/home/jesusr/.claude.json" 2>/dev/null
sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure "/home/jesusr/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo chown -R "jesusr:jesusr" "/home/jesusr/.azure" 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl stop "jesus-reyes-bot.service" "jesus-reyes-responder.service" 2>/dev/null
PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' "/etc/systemd/system/jesus-reyes-bot.service" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
echo "  PORT=$PORT"
for f in "jesus-reyes-bot.py" "jesus-reyes-responder.py" "jesus-reyes-graph-token.sh" "jesus-reyes-send-to.sh" "jesus-reyes-remember.sh" "jesus-reyes-install-chat-app.sh" "jesus-reyes-pinned.sh" "jesus-reyes-download.sh"; do
  [ -f "/home/azureuser/$f" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/$f" "/home/jesusr/"
done
[ -d "/home/azureuser/.jesus-reyes-bot" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/.jesus-reyes-bot" "/home/jesusr/"
[ -d "/home/azureuser/jesus-reyes-teams-app" ] && sudo cp -r "/home/azureuser/jesus-reyes-teams-app" "/home/jesusr/"
for f in "/home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-bot.py" "/home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-responder.py" /home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-*.sh; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.jesus-reyes-bot|/home/jesusr/.jesus-reyes-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/jesus-reyes-|/home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-|g" "$f"
done
sudo chown -R "jesusr:jesusr" "/home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-bot.py" "/home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-responder.py" /home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-*.sh "/home/jesusr/.jesus-reyes-bot" "/home/jesusr/jesus-reyes-teams-app" 2>/dev/null
sudo chmod 600 "/home/jesusr/.jesus-reyes-bot/creds.json" 2>/dev/null
for unit in "jesus-reyes-bot" "jesus-reyes-responder"; do
  UF="/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service"
  sudo tee "$UF" > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: jesusr)
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "jesus-reyes-responder" ]; then echo "jesus-reyes-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=jesusr
WorkingDirectory=/home/jesusr
Environment=HOME=/home/jesusr
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "jesus-reyes-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=$PORT"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/jesusr/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
done
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl start "jesus-reyes-bot.service" "jesus-reyes-responder.service"
sleep 3
echo "  bot=$(systemctl is-active jesus-reyes-bot.service) resp=$(systemctl is-active jesus-reyes-responder.service)"
